articles.title: 18,000 flats in 12 neighbourhoods to be upgraded under Home Improvement Programme
articles.content: SINGAPORE - Around 18,000 flats across Singapore have been selected for home upgrading works under the Housing Board’s Home Improvement Programme (HIP). The Government has allocated $253 million for the works, said the HDB. The Government has spent about $5 billion on these works, she added. Within Bukit Batok East, more than 1,600 households across 14 blocks have been selected for the upcoming...
